holdings.infoBox: FYEE is an equity ETF with a total of 179 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.94%, Apple at 6.98%, Fidelity Cash Central Fund at 4.47%, Microsoft at 4.15%, and Amazon.com at 3.68%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Yield Enhanced Equity ETF (FYEE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equities similar to the S&P 500 and Russell 1000. The fund sells call options for income generation, emphasizing current income and potential capital growth FYEE was launched on Apr 9, 2024 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Harvesting Volatility: How FYEE Redefines Income in Today's Market
data.text: The income landscape for investors is not only being defined by a search for yield, but also equity participation. In addition to higher inflation, geopolitical events only add to current volatility.

data.title: Fidelity® Launches Three Actively Managed Liquid Alts ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity Investments® today announced the launch of three actively managed liquid alternatives (alts) ETFs: FBUF, FHEQ, and FYEE.
